name: Apple Photos
description: Browse your macOS Photos library and interact with it via AI — natural-language search, auto-caption, dedupe, smart albums, story builder
author: Nimbalyst

marketplace.longDescription: Browse your macOS Photos library inside Nimbalyst and ask AI questions about it. Search by what's in your photos, auto-caption a batch, find duplicates, build smart albums, and turn a shoot into a written story. Uses Apple's PhotoKit framework via a signed helper so your library stays on your Mac.
highlights: Natural-language search across your library ("sunsets at the beach")
Auto-caption and keyword photos in bulk
Save AI searches as smart albums that materialize back to Photos.app
Turn a shoot into a Nimbalyst markdown story

screenshots.alt: Photos browser panel with thumbnail grid and natural-language search

panels.title: Photos
panels.tooltip: Browse your Photos library and search with AI
